title: NAVIGATOR PROGRAM - 211info
text: BEAVERTON RESOURCE CENTER NAVIGATOR PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists in Oregon Health Plan (OHP) and private insurance enrollment via the Federal Health Exchange. 13565 SW Walker Road Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Call Center hours: Monday-Friday 9am-1pm -Walk in hours: Tuesday/Wednesday/ Friday 9am-1pm, Monday/Thursday by appointment only Email (503) 207-5670 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 207-5670 Beaverton Resource Center Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near Nike campus on Murray and Walker Road across from Barnes Elementary School. TrMet bus line 62. Services: Navigator Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - BEAVERTON RESOURCE CENTER FOOD - CARE TO SHARE MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL LITERACY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
